tags.name: Ops — Scheduled Jobs
tags.description: Manual triggers for background jobs (admin-only, inc-07 07c-ii)

post.summary: Manually trigger the ward-day accrual sweep (net-new ops hook, ADR-0018)
Admit a patient to a ward bed
post.description: Creates a PENDING admission, claims the bed (WAITING), creates the UNPAID ward-bed bill, and publishes PatientAdmittedEvent. Activation (PENDING→IN-PROCESS + bed OCCUPIED) is payment-gated.

404.description: Ward bed or ward type not found

422.description: Deceased patient / already admitted / business rule

post.description: Create or update a PENDING admission referral plan. externalMedicalProviderUid is mandatory (CR-07-Q7).
Bills-cleared gate + SoD gate, then signs out the admission, frees the bed, and resets patient type to OUTPATIENT only (insurance plan NOT cleared — legacy asymmetry :5626 vs :5378-5381).

get.summary: List progress notes for an admission
List nursing chart entries for an admission

post.summary: Record a nursing observation chart entry

get.summary: List nursing care plans for an admission

post.summary: Record a nursing care plan entry

get.summary: List medication administrations (MAR) for an admission

post.summary: Record a closed-loop medication administration (MAR) against a GIVEN prescription

get.summary: List dressing charts for an admission

post.summary: Record a dressing chart (creates a PROCEDURE bill)

get.summary: List dosing notes for an admission

post.summary: Record a free-text dosing note against a GIVEN prescription

post.description: Create or update a PENDING discharge plan for the admission. Idempotent: re-save updates the narrative in place.
Bills-cleared gate + SoD second-approver gate, then signs out the admission (SIGNED-OUT), frees the bed, and closes the AdmissionBed.
Create or update a PENDING deceased note. patientSummary and causeOfDeath are mandatory. Admission transitions to HELD and bed freed early.

422.description: Missing summary/cause ('Summary and cause of death are missing') / business rule

post.description: Bills-cleared gate + SoD gate, then signs out the admission (SIGNED-OUT, no dischargedAt stamp) and sets patient type=DECEASED.

get.summary: List consumable charts for an admission

post.summary: Record a consumable chart entry (MEDICINE bill + stock decrement)

delete.summary: Delete a dressing chart (within 24h; billing reversal)
Delete a consumable chart within 24h (billing reversal + stock restore)
